About Me

I’m a developer with over 5 years of experience in front-end development & GIS. I have a special focus on data analysis & visualization and enjoy building performant, interactive web applications.

    Esri · San Diego, CA

    Lead development of interactive data visualization applications for key brand activities. Create custom web map applications for marketing teams and external media partners. Establish and grow relationships with influential media partners to increase adoption of Esri products. Develop and lead training workshops at journalism trade shows and events.

    02/2019 – 12/2019

    Esri · San Diego, CA

    Developed web applications to support key marketing activities. Managed editorial calendar for media strategy team. Consulted media partners on data analysis, visualization, and development best practices.

    11/2016 – 02/2019

    Esri · Redlands, CA

    Designed and developed custom map visualizations for Public Relations outreach. Partnered with product teams to promote Esri tools. Built custom geodatabases for commercial media clients.

    05/2016 – 08/2016

    Esri · Vienna, VA

    Created and presented technical demonstrations to prospective clients. Constructed and delivered GIS databases for use in Esri User Conference. Developed technical resources for business development activities.

    START · College Park, MD

    Compiled and researched a global, multi-modal transportation network database. Produced technical reports on global terrorism methods, food insecurity, and piracy. Presented research findings to university faculty and staff. Developed global geospatial finance database through open-source research.

    University of Maryland · College Park, MD

    Developed curriculum for intermediate physical geography lab. Led weekly classes and guided students through discussion materials. Graded and reported student work.
